productDisplayName: ADIDAS  Men Smoove Black Sports Shoes
description: Soar to the skies and earn those winning points in style with these smooth Smoove adidas shoes. Constructed for ultra-quick performance and enhanced with lightweight comfort, these are poised to set you soaring. Upper Synthetic leather upper with overlays in high gloss finish for maximum durability Synthetic patent leather overlay at the collar for enhanced backfoot protection and support Perforations on the forefoot, side, collar and back heel for ventilation Toe box for maximum forefoot protection Meshed and plushly padded tongue and collar for absolute breathability and snug comfort Bold red and white branding on the tongue Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Midsole Moulded EVA midsole for absolute lightweight comfort and impact protection Padded insole for in-step comfort Outsole Durable non-marking rubber outsole with herring bone pattern for absolute grip and easy movement Pivot points on the big toe mound and heel for easy 180 degree rotation of the foot Arched midfoot with flex grooves for ergonomic comfort shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
